extension.summary: Skip TV intros using TheIntroDB timestamps
extension.description: Service addon: looks up intros on theintrodb.org (community DB at github.com/TheIntroDB), shows a skip button for the intro window. Needs TMDB metadata on what you're playing.
extension.news: v1.0.3 — Overlay uses service monitor so Kodi can unload the add-on for updates (fixes “Update failed” while the skip UI is active).
